name: menu
description: Dropdown menu with viewport-clamped positioning, icon support, disabled states, and separator dividers.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of menu item definitions to display.

props.name: onSelect
props.description: Callback fired when the user selects a menu item.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger element that opens the menu when pressed. Accessibility props must be applied to the trigger element by the caller.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional title displayed at the top of the menu.

props.name: style
props.description: Additional style applied to the outermost trigger wrapper.

props.name: testID
props.description: Test identifier forwarded to the outermost wrapper View.
